title: REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM - 211info
text: BEND OFFICE REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Social Security Administration (SSA) approved representative payee services, receiving and managing disability benefits for clients. The program budgets and pays for essential living expenses such as housing, utilities, food, medical care, personal needs, and clothing, and saves any remaining funds in an interest-bearing account for future use. 20310 Empire Avenue Suite A100 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and very low-income Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 548-2380 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties and the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Representative Payee Services Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - CENTRAL OREGON’S COORDINATED ENTRY SYSTEM HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMESOURCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND OFFICE
